evals.prompt: Run the DS-15 memory eval against v_2_5 core design docs. Use eval version v_1.
evals.expected_output: A structured evaluation report at docs/design/memory-design-tests/v_1/results/v_2_5-ds15-results.md with: report header, scenario index table, per-scenario pipeline traces and findings, cross-scenario synthesis, and aggregate metrics. Should also generate a checklist at docs/design/memory-design-tests/v_1/checklists/checklist-v_2_5.md.

evals.prompt: Evaluate scenarios DS20-16 through DS20-20 from the v_1 eval dataset against v_2_5 design. These are the gap-area scenarios testing multi-party attribution, observation memory, multi-source, implicit feedback, and motivation inference.
evals.expected_output: A structured evaluation report covering only 5 scenarios (DS20-16 to DS20-20) with deep pipeline traces for each. Should reuse the existing checklist if one was generated, otherwise create one. Report should highlight gap-area findings since these scenarios test edge capabilities.
